5use Illuminate\Contracts\Pagination\Paginator;

13
14class AppServiceProvider extends ServiceProvider
15{
16    /**
17     * Register any application services.
18     */

134
135    /**
136     * Bootstrap any application services.
137     */
138    public function boot(): void
139    {
140        setlocale(LC_ALL, 'es_ES', 'es', 'ES', 'es_ES.utf8');
141        \Carbon\Carbon::setLocale(config('app.locale', 'es'));
142        date_default_timezone_set(config('app.timezone'));
143        Schema::defaultStringLength(191);
144        PaginationPaginator::useBootstrap();
145
146        // Registrar observadores
147        AsistenciaAprendiz::observe(AsistenciaAprendizObserver::class);
148
149        // Cargar migraciones de subdirectorios
150        $migrationsPath = database_path('migrations');
151        $directories = glob($migrationsPath . '/*', GLOB_ONLYDIR);
152
153        foreach ($directories as $directory) {
154            $this->loadMigrationsFrom($directory);
155        }
156
157        // Registrar driver de Google Drive
158        try {
159            Storage::extend('google', function ($app, $config) {
160                $options = [];
161
162                if (!empty($config['teamDriveId'] ?? null)) {
163                    $options['teamDriveId'] = $config['teamDriveId'];
164                }
165
166                $client = new \Google\Client();
167                $client->setClientId($config['clientId']);
168                $client->setClientSecret($config['clientSecret']);
169
170                // Establecer scopes explícitos para evitar 403 "forbidden" por permisos insuficientes
171                if (class_exists(\Google\Service\Drive::class)) {
172                    $client->setScopes([\Google\Service\Drive::DRIVE_FILE, \Google\Service\Drive::DRIVE]);
173                } else {
174                    $driveFileScope = 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.file';
175                    $driveScope = 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive';
176                    $client->setScopes([$driveFileScope, $driveScope]);
177                }
178                $client->setAccessType('offline');
179                if (method_exists($client, 'setIncludeGrantedScopes')) {
180                    $client->setIncludeGrantedScopes(true);
181                }
182
183                // Usar refresh token configurado para obtener/renovar el access token
184                $client->refreshToken($config['refreshToken']);
185
186                $service = new \Google\Service\Drive($client);
187                $adapter = new \Masbug\Flysystem\GoogleDriveAdapter(
188                    $service,
189                    $config['folderId'] ?? '/',
190                    $options
191                );
192                $driver = new \League\Flysystem\Filesystem($adapter);
193
194                return new \Illuminate\Filesystem\FilesystemAdapter($driver, $adapter);
195            });
196        } catch (\Exception $e) {
197            Log::error('Error al registrar driver de Google Drive: ' . $e->getMessage());
198        }
199    }
200}
